hooks.prompt: The session has just started. Invoke /claude-mem:mem-search to search persistent project memory for context relevant to this project and session. Make the results available to the main conversation.

Read tool_input.file_path from $ARGUMENTS. Read the file. Check for: (1) redundancy, missed reuse opportunities, efficiency issues; (2) bugs, type safety issues, best-practice violations. Report concrete, actionable findings as bullet points. Omit praise. Produce no output if no issues are found.

Read tool_input.file_path from $ARGUMENTS. Read the file. Check for: (1) redundancy, missed reuse opportunities, efficiency issues; (2) bugs, type safety issues, best-practice violations. Report concrete, actionable findings as bullet points. Omit praise. Produce no output if no issues are found.

Read tool_input.file_path from $ARGUMENTS. Audit the wireframe against: (1) design tokens in packages/design-system (exact hex values, only allowed type/spacing/radius scales); (2) locked UI patterns in CLAUDE.md §7 (validation, toggles, wizards, modals, shell layout, callouts); (3) exclusions in CLAUDE.md §8. Report concrete violations as bullet points citing the specific rule. Produce no output if fully compliant.

hooks.command: b=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$b" == remediation/* ]]; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"SKILL-GUARD [branch: %s]: Code written on remediation branch. Check for: hardcoded credentials, command injection, insecure execution patterns, missing input validation, privilege escalation vectors."}}' "$b"; fi

hooks.prompt: Read tool_input.file_path from $ARGUMENTS. When the path ends in .tsx or .ts: invoke /playwright-skill with the file path to generate E2E tests for this component.
hooks.statusMessage: Generating E2E tests for UI component...

hooks.prompt: Read tool_input.file_path from $ARGUMENTS. Invoke /engineering-skills and /engineering-advanced-skills to review and enhance the implementation at this path.
hooks.statusMessage: Applying engineering review to service file...

hooks.prompt: Read tool_input.file_path from $ARGUMENTS. When the file matches schema/contract patterns (*.schema.ts, *.schema.json, *.yaml, or any file under contracts/): invoke /engineering-skills and /engineering-advanced-skills to review the schema definition.
hooks.statusMessage: Applying engineering review to schema file...

hooks.prompt: Read tool_input.file_path from $ARGUMENTS. Invoke /pm-skills and /product-skills to analyze the updated sprint plan and surface relevant insights for the SecureLoop GRC platform.
Read tool_input.file_path from $ARGUMENTS. Invoke /pm-skills and /product-skills to analyze the updated user stories document and surface relevant insights for the SecureLoop GRC platform.

Read tool_input.file_path from $ARGUMENTS. Invoke /ui-ux-pro-max:ui-ux-pro-max to assess design quality across styles, colour, and typography. Then invoke /impeccable:audit to run technical quality checks covering accessibility, performance, theming, and anti-patterns. Report findings from both.
hooks.statusMessage: Running UI/UX quality review on new screen...

hooks.prompt: A git commit was just executed. Run 'git diff HEAD~1 --stat' then 'git diff HEAD~1' to see what changed. Check for: (1) exposed secrets or API keys; (2) SQL/command/XSS injection vulnerabilities; (3) missing authentication or authorization checks; (4) tenant isolation violations — any DB query missing tenant_id filter; (5) missing Zod validation at API boundaries; (6) OWASP top 10 issues. Report concrete findings as bullet points. Produce no output if clean.

A pnpm build just completed. Read tool_response from $ARGUMENTS to confirm the build exited with code 0 (success). If it succeeded, invoke /stress-test to run business assumption stress testing on the work just built and report concrete findings.
hooks.statusMessage: Running stress-test analysis after successful build...

hooks.prompt: Read tool_input.command from $ARGUMENTS. Extract the branch name — if '-b' is present the branch name follows it; otherwise it is the last non-flag argument. When the branch starts with 'sprint/' or 'feat/': invoke /claude-mem:make-plan to create a phased implementation plan for this branch.
hooks.statusMessage: Creating implementation plan for new branch...

hooks.prompt: Read tool_input.command from $ARGUMENTS. Extract the branch name — if '-c' or '--create' is present the branch name follows it. When the branch starts with 'sprint/' or 'feat/': invoke /claude-mem:make-plan to create a phased implementation plan for this branch.
hooks.statusMessage: Creating implementation plan for new branch...

hooks.prompt: Read tool_input.command from $ARGUMENTS to get the tag name. Invoke /claude-mem:version-bump to run the semantic versioning and release workflow for this new tag in the SecureLoop monorepo.
hooks.statusMessage: Running version bump workflow for new tag...
